name: Masala Oats with Veggies
steps: Heat ghee, splutter cumin, add onion + chili. Sauté 2 min.
Add tomato, peas, turmeric, salt. Cook 2 min.
Add oats + water. Simmer 5 min until thick.
Top with Greek yogurt.

name: Scrambled Eggs + Avocado Toast
steps: Toast bread.
Mash avocado on toast with salt + chili flakes.
Scramble eggs in oil, salt + pepper.
Plate together.

name: Greek Yogurt Bowl with Nuts + Berries
steps: Layer yogurt in bowl.
Top with berries, nuts, chia, honey.
Done.

name: Besan Chilla (Savory Chickpea Pancake)
ingredients: 1/2 tsp turmeric, 1/2 tsp ajwain, salt, chili
steps: Mix besan + spices + water into smooth batter.
Stir in onion, tomato, cilantro.
Heat oil in pan, pour batter, spread thin.
Cook 3 min each side. Makes 2 chillas.

name: Paneer Bhurji on Toast
steps: Heat oil, sauté onion 2 min, add tomato + spices 2 min.
Add crumbled paneer, mix, cook 3 min.
Top toast with paneer bhurji.

name: Veggie Omelette + Toast
steps: Whisk eggs with salt + pepper.
Sauté veggies 2 min in oiled pan.
Pour eggs, top with cheese, fold when set.
Serve with toast.

name: Paneer Paratha (pre-prepped, reheat)
prePrepNote: Sunday: make + freeze 4-5 parathas. Mon-Fri: heat on tawa 3 min each.
ingredients: 2 cups whole wheat flour, 1.5 cups water, salt
steps: Take 1 paratha from freezer (or fridge).
Heat tawa medium-high. Cook paratha 90 sec each side until warm + golden.
Serve with yogurt + pickle.
— Sunday prep: knead dough; mix paneer with onion + spices; stuff dough balls, roll, cook on tawa 2 min each side; cool + stack with parchment; freeze.

name: Spinach-Paneer Egg Muffins (batch, microwave)
prePrepNote: Sunday: bake 12 muffins (25 min). Mon-Fri: microwave 2 muffins, 60 sec.
steps: Microwave 2 muffins on a plate, 60 sec.
Toast bread if using.
Eat warm.
— Sunday prep: whisk eggs + milk + salt; stir in veggies + paneer; pour into greased muffin tin; bake at 350°F for 20 min; cool + refrigerate up to 4 days (or freeze).

name: Savory Steel-Cut Oats (batch, reheat)
prePrepNote: Sunday: cook 4 servings (25 min). Mon-Thu: microwave + fresh tadka, 3 min.
ingredients: 1 tsp ghee, mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chili
1.5 cups steel-cut oats, 5 cups water, salt, turmeric
steps: Microwave oats with milk/water 90 sec, stir.
Heat ghee in small pan; splutter mustard + curry leaves + chili.
Pour tadka over oats. Top with yogurt.
— Sunday batch: simmer steel-cut oats with water + salt + turmeric for 20-25 min until soft; cool; portion into 4 jars; refrigerate.

name: Savory Upma (rava jar mix)
prePrepNote: Sunday: portion 5 dry mix jars (10 min). Each morning: 7 min stove.
ingredients: 1 jar dry mix (rava + spices + dried veg)
1/2 cup rava (sooji), 1 tbsp dried mixed veg flakes
Mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves (dried), turmeric, salt
steps: Heat ghee in pan, dump jar contents in. Toast 1 min stirring.
Add water, stir to avoid lumps. Cover, simmer 5 min.
Squeeze lemon, top with cilantro.
— Sunday: combine rava + spices + dried veg into 5 jars. Label.

name: Moong Dal Chilla (pre-mixed batter)
prePrepNote: Sunday: blend batter (10 min). Mon-Wed: cook 1 chilla each morning, 4 min.
ingredients: 1 cup yellow moong dal, soaked 4 hours
Blend smooth with 1/2 cup water; refrigerate 3 days max
steps: Oil hot tawa. Pour batter, spread thin.
Cook 2 min each side until golden.
Serve with yogurt or chutney.
— Sunday: soak dal 4 hr, blend with spices, refrigerate in jar.

name: Dal Tadka + Rice
ingredients: Turmeric, red chili, garam masala, salt
steps: Pressure cook dal with turmeric + salt + 3 cups water (3 whistles).
Cook rice separately (1:2 water).
For tadka: heat ghee, splutter cumin + mustard, add ginger-garlic, onion. Brown 4 min.
Add tomato + spices, cook 3 min, pour over dal.
Garnish + serve with rice. Refrigerate half for tomorrow.

name: Chana Masala + Roti
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, cumin, garam masala, coriander, chili, turmeric
steps: Heat oil, cumin. Add ginger-garlic, onion. Brown 5 min.
Add tomato puree + spices. Cook 5 min until oil separates.
Add chickpeas + 1/2 cup water. Simmer 10 min.
Mash a few chickpeas for thickness. Serve with roti.

name: Rajma (Red Kidney Bean Curry) + Rice
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, cumin, garam masala, coriander, chili
steps: Cook rice (1:2 water, 15 min).
Sauté onion + ginger-garlic 5 min.
Add tomato puree + spices, cook 5 min.
Add beans + 1 cup water, simmer 10 min, mash some.
Serve with rice.

name: Palak Paneer + Roti
ingredients: 2 tsp ghee, cumin, garam masala, salt
steps: Blanch spinach 2 min, blend smooth.
Heat ghee, cumin, ginger-garlic, onion. Brown 4 min.
Add tomato + spices, cook 3 min.
Add spinach puree, simmer 5 min.
Add paneer + cream, simmer 3 min. Serve with roti.

name: Vegetable Pulao + Raita
ingredients: 1.5 cups mixed veg (carrot, peas, beans, cauliflower)
2 tsp ghee, bay leaf, cardamom, cinnamon, cumin
1 cup Greek yogurt + grated cucumber for raita
steps: Heat ghee, whole spices, cumin. Add onion + ginger-garlic, brown 4 min.
Add veggies, sauté 3 min.
Add rice + 2 cups water + salt. Simmer covered 15 min.
Mix yogurt + cucumber + salt for raita.

name: Paneer Tikka Bowl
ingredients: 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, garam masala, chili, turmeric, ginger-garlic paste
steps: Marinate paneer + veggies in yogurt + spices 10 min.
Cook rice in parallel.
Pan-sear paneer + veggies 8 min until charred.
Plate over rice, squeeze lemon.

name: Chicken Curry + Rice
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, cumin, garam masala, coriander, chili, turmeric
steps: Cook rice in parallel.
Sauté onion + ginger-garlic 5 min.
Add tomato puree + spices, cook 5 min.
Add chicken, sear 3 min. Add 1/2 cup water, simmer covered 12 min.
Garnish + serve with rice.

name: Butter Chicken + Roti
ingredients: Garam masala, kasuri methi, chili, ginger-garlic paste
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt + spices 10 min (or skip).
Sear chicken in butter 5 min. Remove.
Sauté ginger-garlic + tomato puree + spices 5 min.
Add chicken back + cream, simmer 10 min.
Serve with roti.

name: Chicken Tikka Bowl
ingredients: 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, tikka masala, ginger-garlic, lemon
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt + spices 10 min.
Cook rice in parallel.
Pan-sear chicken + veggies 12 min until cooked through.
Plate over rice with cilantro + lemon.

name: Lamb Keema + Roti
ingredients: Garam masala, cumin, coriander, chili, turmeric
steps: Sauté onion + ginger-garlic 5 min.
Add lamb, brown 8 min, breaking up.
Add tomatoes + spices, cook 5 min.
Add peas + 1/4 cup water, simmer 5 min.
Serve with roti.

name: Shrimp Curry + Rice
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, curry leaves, mustard seeds, turmeric, chili
steps: Cook rice.
Splutter mustard + curry leaves in oil.
Add onion + ginger-garlic, brown 4 min.
Add tomato + spices, cook 4 min. Add coconut milk, simmer 3 min.
Add shrimp, cook 3 min until pink. Serve with rice.

name: Grilled Chicken + Rice + Veggies
ingredients: 1 tbsp olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, pepper, lemon
steps: Cook rice (1:2 water).
Season chicken with spices, sear 6 min each side.
Steam or roast broccoli 8 min.
Slice chicken, plate with rice + broccoli, squeeze lemon.

name: Chicken Veggie Stir Fry
ingredients: 3 cups mixed veg (bell pepper, broccoli, snap peas, carrot)
3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, garlic, ginger, sriracha
steps: Cook rice.
High heat: sear chicken in oil 5 min, remove.
Stir-fry veggies 4 min.
Return chicken, add sauce + garlic + ginger. Toss 2 min.
Serve over rice.

name: Shrimp Fried Rice
ingredients: 3 tbsp soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, scallion
steps: Scramble eggs in oiled pan, set aside.
Stir-fry shrimp 3 min, set aside.
Stir-fry veggies + garlic 3 min.
Add rice, soy, scallion. Toss 3 min. Return shrimp + eggs.

name: Hearty Lentil Soup + Bread
steps: Sauté onion + carrot + celery + garlic 5 min in oil.
Add spices, lentils, broth. Simmer 20 min.
Squeeze lemon. Serve with bread.

name: Quinoa Chickpea Power Bowl (cold-ish)
ingredients: 1 cucumber, 1 cup cherry tomatoes, 1/4 red onion
steps: Cook quinoa (1:2 water, 15 min).
Roast chickpeas with oil + spices 15 min at 425°F (or pan-crisp 8 min).
Chop veggies.
Assemble bowl: quinoa, chickpeas, veggies, feta, dressing.

name: Smashed Chickpea Salad Wrap (cold)
steps: Mash chickpeas roughly with fork.
Mix with yogurt/tahini, celery, onion, dijon, lemon.
Wrap in tortilla with lettuce.

name: Pasta Primavera with Chicken
ingredients: 2 cups mixed veg (zucchini, bell pepper, cherry tomatoes)
3 garlic, olive oil, parmesan, basil, chili flakes
steps: Boil pasta per package.
Sear chicken in oil 6 min, remove.
Sauté garlic + veggies 5 min.
Toss pasta + chicken + veggies + olive oil + parmesan.

name: Shrimp Tacos with Slaw
ingredients: 1/4 cup Greek yogurt + lime + cumin + chipotle
steps: Mix yogurt + lime + spices for slaw dressing. Toss with cabbage.
Sear shrimp in oil + cumin + chili 4 min.
Warm tortillas. Assemble: shrimp + slaw + avocado + cilantro.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap (cold)
steps: Season + sear chicken 6 min each side. Slice.
Toss lettuce + dressing + parmesan.
Wrap in tortilla with sliced chicken.

name: Pan-fried Paneer Tikka Bites
ingredients: Tikka masala, chili, ginger-garlic paste, lemon
steps: Toss paneer with spices + lemon.
Pan-fry in oil 4 min, turning, until golden.
Sprinkle chaat masala. Eat hot.

name: Quick Egg Bhurji (small portion)
steps: Whisk eggs with spices.
Sauté onion + tomato 2 min.
Pour eggs, scramble 2 min. Eat hot.

name: Masala Makhana (Fox Nuts) — warm
prePrepNote: Sunday: roast big batch in 10 min. Reheat 30 sec each time.
ingredients: Chaat masala, salt, turmeric, chili powder
steps: Microwave 30 sec to warm. Eat with chai.
— Sunday: heat ghee, add spices, toss in makhana. Roast 8-10 min on low until crisp. Store airtight.

name: Cottage Cheese + Berries (cold)
steps: Combine in bowl.

name: Protein Shake (whey + milk)
steps: Blend or shake.

name: Boiled Eggs + Almonds
steps: Boil eggs (batch on Sunday for the week). Eat with almonds.

name: Paneer + Cucumber Bites (cold)
steps: Toss paneer with chaat masala + lemon. Eat with cucumber.

name: Spiced Roasted Chickpeas
steps: Toss chickpeas with oil + spices.
Roast at 400°F for 25 min until crisp.
Store in airtight container — lasts 4 days.
